About the Project

What is SFEAS?

SFEAS (Smart Factory Energy Analytics System) is a complete end-to-end IoT solution designed to monitor, analyze, and optimize energy consumption in industrial factory environments.

The system uses ESP32 microcontrollers equipped with ACS712 current sensors and ZMPT101B voltage sensors to measure real-time power consumption (kW) across 18 factory machines. Sensor data is transmitted every 1.5 seconds via the MQTT protocol to a Node.js backend.

The backend processes incoming data, stores it in memory, and immediately pushes updates to the React dashboard via Socket.io WebSockets. Every 10 seconds, the Python ML service runs Isolation Forest + Z-Score anomaly detection to identify machines behaving abnormally.

All data syncs to Firebase Realtime Database every 5 seconds, enabling cross-device access and historical trend analysis. The hardware was simulated using Wokwi online ESP32 simulator, making the entire project software-deployable without physical hardware.

Problem Statement

Industrial factories consume massive amounts of energy with little visibility into per-machine consumption. Idle machines waste power, faults go undetected, and CO₂ emissions are untracked — leading to inflated costs and environmental impact.

Our Solution

Real-time per-machine monitoring with ML-powered anomaly detection. Operators see live power, CO₂, and cost data. Faults are detected within 10 seconds. Idle machines are flagged instantly. Optimization recommendations show exact ₹ savings achievable per day.

Anomaly detection time
Alert System — 3 Severity Levels
🔴 CRITICAL
Overcurrent fault detected · Machine at 340%+ load · Immediate shutdown required
🟡 WARNING
Idle machine wasting power · High temperature detected · Peak demand approaching limit
🔵 INFO
Minor power deviation · Scheduled maintenance due · Load shift opportunity available
What it does

Factory intelligence,
in real time

SFEAS collects sensor data from every machine, detects faults before they escalate, and surfaces actionable cost-saving recommendations.

⚡
Live Power Monitoring
Tracks kW, voltage, current, and load % for all 18 machines simultaneously — updated every 1.5 seconds via MQTT protocol.
🌱
CO₂ Emissions Tracking
Calculates real-time CO₂ using India grid emission factor (0.82 kg/kWh), broken down by machine and department with pie charts.
🧠
ML Anomaly Detection
Isolation Forest + Z-Score ensemble scores every machine every 10 seconds. Scores above 0.7 trigger CRITICAL alerts automatically.
💰
Cost Optimization
Identifies idle machine waste, off-peak load shifting, and maintenance needs — with projected ₹ savings per day.
📈
Demand Forecasting
36-hour ahead demand prediction with peak window identification and 1000 kW contract threshold monitoring.
☁️
Firebase Cloud Sync
All machine readings and KPIs sync to Firebase Realtime Database every 5 seconds — accessible from any device, anywhere.
Dashboard

ML Models

Two models, one anomaly score

Isolation Forest
Multivariate anomaly detection
Trained on power, current, temperature, load. Detects unusual combinations that wouldn't trigger single-threshold alerts.
Z-Score
Fleet-relative power spikes
Compares each machine against the fleet mean. Catches sudden spikes and idle waste with interpretable scores.
Combined
Weighted ensemble score
IsoForest 60% + Z-Score 40% → single 0–1 anomaly score per machine, updated every 10 seconds.
# Anomaly score thresholds
CRITICAL score > 0.7 # fault / overcurrent
WARNING score > 0.5 # idle waste / spike
INFO score > 0.3 # minor deviation
